.msg-pending { opacity: 0.5; }

/* --- Message cards (meetup + location) --- */
.msg-card { background: var(--color-surface); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: var(--space-md); margin-top: var(--space-xs); width: 260px; display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; cursor: pointer; }
.msg-card:active { background: var(--color-surface-hover); }
.msg-card .card-label { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-accent); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: var(--space-xs); }
.msg-card .card-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-sm); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.msg-card .card-meta { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); margin-top: var(--space-xs); }
.msg-card.card-meetup { background: var(--user-1-bg); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--color-accent); }
.meetup-join { display: inline-block; padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-accent); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); font-size: var(--font-xs); font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; background: none; color: var(--color-accent); font-family: inherit; margin-top: var(--space-sm); }
.meetup-join.joined { background: var(--color-accent); color: #fff; }
.meetup-going { font-weight: 400; }
.meetup-join-wide { width: 260px; display: block; margin-top: var(--space-xs); padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-sm); }
.msg-card.card-location { background: var(--user-5-bg); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--color-success); }
.msg-card.card-location .card-label { color: var(--color-success); }

/* --- Link preview --- */
.msg-link-preview { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; margin-bottom: var(--space-sm); border-radius: var(--radius-md); overflow: hidden; background: var(--color-surface); max-width: 480px; cursor: pointer; }
.msg-link-preview:active { opacity: 0.85; }
.link-preview-img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: auto; display: block; -webkit-touch-callout: none; }
.link-preview-body { padding: 10px var(--space-md); }
.link-preview-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-sm); line-height: 1.3; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.link-preview-desc { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); margin-top: var(--space-xs); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; line-height: 1.4; }
.link-preview-domain { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); margin-top: 3px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

/* --- Input bar --- */
.input-bar { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: var(--space-xs); padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md); border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border); background: var(--color-bg); flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; }
.pwa-standalone .input-bar { padding-bottom: 20px; }
.input-bar button { background: none; border: none; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; color: var(--color-text-secondary); width: 32px; height: 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.input-bar button svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; }
.input-wrap { flex: 1; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; }
.input-wrap textarea { width: 100%; padding: 10px 44px 10px var(--space-lg); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 20px; font-size: var(--font-base); outline: none; font-family: inherit; resize: none; overflow-y: hidden; line-height: 1.4; box-sizing: content-box; scrollbar-width: none; }
.input-wrap textarea:focus { border-color: var(--gray-400); }
.input-wrap textarea.overlimit { border-color: #e53935; }
.input-wrap textarea.overlimit:focus { border-color: #e53935; }
.input-bar .send.disabled { opacity: 0.3; pointer-events: none; }
.input-wrap textarea::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
.input-wrap textarea.multiline { border-radius: var(--radius-lg); }
.input-bar .emoji-btn { position: absolute; right: 10px; bottom: 9px; width: 22px; height: 22px; padding: 0; background: none; border: none; color: var(--color-disabled); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 0; }
.input-bar .emoji-btn svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }
.input-bar .send { color: var(--color-text-secondary); }
.input-bar .send svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; }

/* --- Action menu popup --- */
.action-menu { display: none; position: absolute; bottom: 100%; left: var(--space-sm); margin-bottom: var(--space-xs); background: var(--color-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); z-index: 50; overflow: hidden; }
.action-menu.open { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.action-menu button { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-md); padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-xl); border: none; background: none; font-size: var(--font-sm); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; text-align: left; font-family: inherit; width: 100%; height: auto; color: var(--color-text); justify-content: flex-start; }
.action-menu button:active { background: var(--color-surface); }
@media (hover: hover) { .action-menu button:hover { background: var(--color-surface); } }

/* --- Reply preview --- */
.reply-preview { display: none; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md); border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border); background: var(--color-surface); flex-shrink: 0; }
.reply-preview.visible { display: flex; }
.reply-preview-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; border-left: 3px solid var(--color-accent); padding-left: var(--space-sm); }
.reply-preview-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-xs); display: block; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.reply-preview-text { font-size: var(--font-sm); line-height: 1.4; color: var(--color-muted); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: block; }
.reply-preview-close { background: none; border: none; font-size: 18px; color: var(--color-muted); cursor: pointer; padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm); }

/* --- Reply quote in message --- */
.reply-quote { border-left: 3px solid var(--color-accent); padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm); margin: 6px 0; cursor: pointer; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); }
.msg-mine-bubble .reply-quote { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
.reply-quote-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-xs); display: block; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.reply-quote-text { font-size: var(--font-sm); line-height: 1.4; color: var(--color-muted); display: block; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; max-width: 200px; }
.msg.highlight { animation: msg-highlight 1.5s ease-out; }
@keyframes msg-highlight { 0% { background: rgba(185,28,28,0.1); } 100% { background: transparent; } }

/* --- Reactions --- */
.reaction-pills { position: absolute; bottom: -16px; display: flex; gap: 3px; z-index: 5; }
.msg-mine-bubble .reaction-pills { right: var(--space-sm); }
.msg-other-bubble .reaction-pills { left: var(--space-sm); }
.reaction-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 2px; padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); background: var(--color-surface); font-size: var(--font-sm); cursor: pointer; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); line-height: 1; text-align: center; }
.reaction-pill.own { border-color: var(--color-accent); }
.react-btn { opacity: 0; position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background: var(--color-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 50%; width: 30px; height: 30px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; z-index: var(--z-sticky); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); transition: opacity var(--transition-fast); color: var(--color-text-secondary); }
.react-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }
@media (hover: hover) { .msg-bubble:hover .react-btn { opacity: 1; } }
.react-btn.active { opacity: 1; }
.msg-other-bubble .react-btn { left: auto; right: -38px; }
.msg-mine-bubble .react-btn { right: auto; left: -38px; }
.msg-bubble::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 88px; }
.msg-other-bubble::after { right: -88px; }
.msg-mine-bubble::after { left: -88px; }
.reaction-picker { display: flex; gap: 2px; background: var(--color-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-pill); padding: var(--space-xs) 6px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); position: fixed; z-index: var(--z-toast); white-space: nowrap; }
.reaction-picker button { background: none; border: none; font-size: var(--font-xl); padding: var(--space-xs) 6px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 50%; }
@media (hover: hover) { .reaction-picker button:hover { background: var(--color-surface); } }

/* --- Action sheet (mobile bottom drawer / desktop centered modal) --- */
.action-sheet-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); z-index: var(--z-popup); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; -webkit-user-select: none; user-select: none; -webkit-touch-callout: none; }
.action-sheet-overlay.open { opacity: 1; }
.action-sheet { background: var(--color-bg); width: 90%; max-width: 360px; border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: var(--space-sm) 0 0; transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.2s, opacity 0.2s; -webkit-user-select: none; user-select: none; overflow: hidden; }
.action-sheet > :last-child { padding-bottom: calc(var(--space-md) + var(--space-sm)); }
.action-sheet-overlay.open .action-sheet { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
.action-sheet-title { text-align: center; font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-base); color: var(--color-muted); padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); }
.action-sheet-desc { text-align: center; font-size: var(--font-sm); color: var(--color-muted); padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); margin: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); }
.action-sheet-btn { display: block; width: 100%; padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); border: none; background: none; font-size: var(--font-base); cursor: pointer; text-align: center; font-family: inherit; color: var(--color-text); }
@media (hover: hover) { .action-sheet-btn:active { background: var(--color-surface); } }
.action-sheet-danger { color: var(--color-accent); }
.action-sheet-cancel { color: var(--color-muted); border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border); margin-top: var(--space-xs); }

/* --- Image/video viewer --- */
.image-viewer { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); z-index: var(--z-toast); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; }
.image-viewer.open { opacity: 1; }
.image-viewer img { max-width: 90%; max-height: 90%; object-fit: contain; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); }
.viewer-close { position: absolute; top: var(--space-md); right: var(--space-md); width: 32px; height: 32px; filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)); opacity: 0.8; cursor: pointer; }

/* --- Video trim editor --- */
.trim-editor video { width: 100%; border-radius: 0; display: block; background: #000; }
.trim-controls { padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: var(--space-sm); }
.trim-track { position: relative; height: 32px; background: var(--color-surface); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); cursor: pointer; }
.trim-range { position: absolute; top: 0; height: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); }
.trim-handle { position: absolute; top: 0; width: 12px; height: 100%; background: var(--color-text); border-radius: 3px; cursor: ew-resize; z-index: 2; }
.trim-handle::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); width: 2px; height: 12px; background: #fff; border-radius: 1px; }
.trim-playhead { position: absolute; top: 0; width: 2px; height: 100%; background: var(--color-accent); z-index: 1; pointer-events: none; }
.trim-times { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); }
.trim-duration { text-align: center; font-size: var(--font-sm); font-weight: 600; }

/* --- Modal --- */
.modal-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: var(--z-popup); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; }
.modal-overlay.open { opacity: 1; }
.modal { background: var(--color-bg); width: calc(100% - var(--space-2xl)); max-width: 400px; border-radius: var(--radius-lg); overflow: visible; transform: scale(0.95); transition: transform 0.2s; }
.modal-overlay.open .modal { transform: scale(1); }
.modal-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); }
.modal-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: var(--font-base); }
.modal-close { background: none; border: none; font-size: 22px; cursor: pointer; padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm); color: var(--color-muted); }
.modal-body { padding: var(--space-lg); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: var(--space-sm); }
.modal-label { font-size: var(--font-xs); font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-muted); margin-top: var(--space-xs); }
.modal-input { padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-sm); outline: none; width: 100%; font-family: inherit; }
.modal-input:focus { border-color: var(--gray-400); }
.modal-textarea { padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-sm); outline: none; resize: vertical; width: 100%; font-family: inherit; }
.modal-footer { padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg); border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border); }
.modal-btn-primary { width: 100%; padding: var(--space-md); background: var(--gray-900); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-base); cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; }
.modal-btn-secondary { padding: var(--space-md); background: var(--color-surface); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-sm); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; font-family: inherit; }

/* --- Auth screen --- */
.auth-screen { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: var(--space-lg); padding: var(--space-2xl); flex: 1; }
.auth-screen h2 { margin: 0 0 var(--space-sm); font-size: var(--font-xl); }
.auth-screen p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-muted); font-size: var(--font-sm); text-align: center; }
.auth-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: var(--space-md); width: 280px; padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); background: var(--color-bg); font-size: var(--font-base); cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; }
.auth-btn:active { background: var(--color-surface); }
.auth-btn.sent { background: var(--color-success); border-color: var(--color-success); color: #fff; pointer-events: none; }
.auth-btn.sent svg { display: block; }
.auth-input { width: 280px; padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-base); outline: none; text-align: center; font-family: inherit; }
.auth-input:focus { border-color: var(--gray-400); }

/* --- Profile prompt --- */
.profile-prompt { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-lg); padding: var(--space-2xl); flex: 1; justify-content: center; }
.profile-prompt h2 { margin: 0; font-size: var(--font-xl); }
.profile-field { width: 320px; position: relative; }
.profile-field input { width: 100%; padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-base); text-align: center; outline: none; font-family: inherit; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
.profile-field input:focus { border-color: var(--gray-400); }
.profile-field input.valid, .profile-field input.valid:focus { border-color: var(--color-success); }
.profile-field .field-status { position: absolute; right: var(--space-md); top: 0; height: 46px; display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: var(--font-xs); }
.profile-field .field-status.ok { color: var(--color-success); }
.profile-field .field-status.err { color: var(--color-accent); }
.profile-field .field-hint { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); text-align: center; margin-top: var(--space-xs); min-height: 1.3em; text-wrap: balance; }
.profile-field .field-hint.err { color: var(--color-accent); }
.profile-preview { width: 320px; background: var(--gray-50); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: var(--space-lg); }
.profile-preview .msg-bubble { max-width: 90%; }
.profile-preview-label { font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); margin-bottom: var(--space-sm); text-align: center; }
.country-picker { position: relative; width: 320px; }
.country-picker input { width: 100%; padding: var(--space-md); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-base); outline: none; font-family: inherit; text-align: center; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
.country-picker input:focus { border-color: var(--gray-400); }
.country-picker input.valid, .country-picker input.valid:focus { border-color: var(--color-success); }
.country-picker > .field-status { position: absolute; right: var(--space-md); top: 0; height: 46px; display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: var(--font-xs); z-index: 1; }
.country-picker .field-status.ok { color: var(--color-success); }
.country-list { position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0; max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto; background: var(--color-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-top: none; border-radius: 0 0 var(--radius-md) var(--radius-md); z-index: 50; display: none; scrollbar-width: none; }
.country-list::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
.country-picker.open .country-list { display: block; }
.country-item { padding: var(--space-md); cursor: pointer; font-size: var(--font-sm); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); }
.country-item:hover, .country-item.highlighted { background: var(--color-surface); }
.country-item .flag { font-size: 18px; }
.profile-prompt button { width: 320px; padding: var(--space-md); background: var(--gray-900); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: var(--font-base); cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; }
.avatar-upload { width: 128px; height: 128px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-surface); border: 2px dashed var(--color-border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; position: relative; }
.avatar-upload img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
.avatar-upload svg { width: 32px; height: 32px; color: var(--color-disabled); }
.avatar-edit { width: 128px; height: 128px; border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; position: relative; touch-action: none; }
.avatar-edit img { position: absolute; user-select: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; will-change: transform; }
.avatar-zoom { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-xs); justify-content: center; align-self: center; }
.avatar-zoom-track { width: 96px; height: 1px; background: var(--color-border); border-radius: 1px; position: relative; }
.avatar-zoom-thumb { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gray-400); position: absolute; top: -4.5px; transition: none; }
.avatar-zoom-thumb.hidden { opacity: 0; }
.avatar-zoom span { color: var(--color-disabled); font-size: var(--font-xs); position: relative; top: -1px; }

/* --- Unread badges --- */
.unread-badge { min-width: 18px; padding: 3px 6px; background: var(--color-accent); color: #fff; border-radius: var(--radius-pill); font-size: var(--font-2xs); font-weight: 700; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; line-height: 1; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; }
.tab-dot { display: none; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-accent); margin-left: 6px; vertical-align: middle; position: relative; top: -1px; }
.tab-dot.active { display: inline-block; }

/* --- Hamburger menu (mobile) --- */
.hamburger-dot { display: none; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-accent); position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 8px; }
.hamburger-dot.active { display: block; }
.chat-menu { display: none; }

/* --- Empty state --- */
.empty { text-align: center; padding: var(--space-2xl) var(--space-xl); color: var(--color-muted); font-size: var(--font-sm); }

/* --- Typing --- */
.typing-indicator { padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-lg); font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--color-muted); font-style: italic; min-height: 20px; }

.member-blocked { opacity: 0.4; }

/* ===== MEDIA QUERIES ===== */

/* --- Desktop --- */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .app { flex-direction: row; }
  .sidebar { width: 320px; border-right: 1px solid var(--color-border); display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .sidebar .content { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; }
  .main-panel { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; }
  .main-panel .header { display: flex; }
  .header .header-info { padding-left: 0; }
  .room-item.active { background: var(--color-surface); }
  .member-list { flex: 1; min-height: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border); }
  .member-tabs { display: flex; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 var(--color-border); background: var(--color-bg); height: var(--header-h); flex-shrink: 0; }
  .member-tabs button { flex: 1; background: none; border: none; font-size: var(--font-sm); color: var(--color-muted); cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; font-family: inherit; }
  .member-tabs button.active { color: var(--color-text); font-weight: 600; border-bottom-color: var(--color-text); }
  .member-list-items { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; scrollbar-width: none; }
  .member-list-items::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .member-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); padding: 0 var(--space-lg); height: 40px; cursor: pointer; }
  .member-item .avatar-sm { width: 26px; height: 26px; font-size: 11px; }
  .member-item:hover { background: var(--color-surface); }
  .member-item-self { background: var(--color-surface); }
  .member-item-self:hover { background: var(--color-surface-hover); }
  .member-item .avatar-sm { position: relative; }
  .member-name { font-size: var(--font-sm); color: var(--color-text); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
  .member-flag { font-size: var(--font-sm); flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: auto; }
}
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .sidebar { display: none; }
  .sidebar.visible { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; }
  .main-panel { display: none; }
  .main-panel.visible { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; }
  .input-bar { padding: var(--space-sm) calc((var(--header-h) - 32px) / 2); }
  .input-wrap textarea { padding: var(--space-sm) 44px var(--space-sm) var(--space-lg); }
  .nav-icon { display: flex; }
  .hamburger { display: flex; }
  .header-count { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-xs); font-size: var(--font-xs); color: #fff; position: absolute; right: var(--header-h); top: 0; height: var(--header-h); }
  .header .header-info { padding-right: calc(var(--header-h) + 36px); }
  .react-btn { opacity: 1; width: 24px; height: 24px; }
  .react-btn svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
  .chat-menu { position: fixed; top: var(--header-h); left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; z-index: var(--z-menu); background: var(--gray-900); flex-direction: column; overflow-y: auto; scrollbar-width: none; -ms-overflow-style: none; }
  .chat-menu::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .chat-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .menu-section { background: none; color: #ccc; border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--gray-700); padding: 14px var(--space-lg); font-size: 15px; text-align: left; font-family: inherit; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); width: 100%; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; }
  .menu-section .menu-arrow { margin-left: auto; width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .menu-section .arrow-down { display: none; }
  .menu-section .arrow-right { display: block; }
  .menu-section.expanded .arrow-down { display: block; }
  .menu-section.expanded .arrow-right { display: none; }
  .menu-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-accent); display: none; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .menu-dot.active { display: inline-block; }
  .menu-items { display: none; background: var(--gray-800); }
  .menu-items.open { display: block; }
  .menu-items .room-item { padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-lg); border-bottom-color: var(--gray-700); }
  .menu-items .room-item.active { background: var(--gray-700); }
  .menu-items .room-item .room-name { color: #fff; }
  .menu-items .room-item .room-count { display: none; }
  .menu-items .room-item .room-desc { display: block; font-size: var(--font-xs); color: var(--gray-400); line-height: 1.2; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
  .menu-items .room-member-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-xs); font-size: var(--font-xs); color: #fff; flex-shrink: 0; order: 3; }
  .menu-items .room-item .room-badge { order: 2; }
  .menu-items .room-bell { order: 4; }
  .menu-items .room-bell.active { color: #fff; }
  .menu-member { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-sm); padding: 0 var(--space-xl); height: 40px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--gray-800); }
  .menu-member:active:not(:has(:active)) { background: var(--gray-700); }
  .menu-member-self { background: var(--gray-700); }
  .menu-member .avatar-sm { width: 26px; height: 26px; font-size: 11px; }
  .menu-member-name { font-size: var(--font-sm); color: #fff; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
  .menu-member-flag { font-size: var(--font-sm); flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: auto; }
}
@media (max-width: 767px) and (max-height: 600px) { .profile-preview { display: none; } }

async function _bitmapToBlob(bmp, w, h) {
  if (typeof OffscreenCanvas !== 'undefined') {
    var oc = new OffscreenCanvas(w, h);
    oc.getContext('bitmaprenderer').transferFromImageBitmap(bmp);
    return oc.convertToBlob({ type: 'image/webp', quality: 0.8 });
  }
  var c = document.createElement('canvas'); c.width = w; c.height = h;
  c.getContext('2d').drawImage(bmp, 0, 0);
  bmp.close();
  return new Promise(function(resolve) { c.toBlob(resolve, 'image/webp', 0.8); });
}

// --- API helpers ---
async function api(path, opts) {
  const res = await fetch(API + path, { credentials: 'include', ...opts });
  if (!res.ok) {
    if ((res.status === 401 || res.status === 403) && path !== '/me' && path !== '/config') {
      currentUser = null;
      renderAuth();
      throw new Error('Session expired');
    }
    const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    throw new Error(err.detail || res.statusText);
  }
  return res.json();
}

async function checkAuth() {
  try { currentUser = await api('/me'); return true; }
  catch { currentUser = null; return false; }

      if (_siteShort) document.title = 'Chat · ' + _siteShort;
      dbg('[AUTH] google client id loaded:', _googleClientId ? 'yes' : 'no');
    } catch (e) { dbg('[AUTH] config fetch failed:', e.message); }

  document.getElementById('app').innerHTML = `

      <button class="auth-btn" id="email-send-btn" onclick="authEmail()">Send magic link</button>

  verify('renderAuth', document.querySelector('.auth-screen'), 'auth screen rendered');

}

function _initGoogle() {
  if (_googleInitialized || !_googleClientId || !window.google?.accounts?.id) return false;
  dbg('[AUTH] initializing google');
  google.accounts.id.initialize({
    client_id: _googleClientId,
    use_fedcm_for_prompt: true,
    callback: async (resp) => {
      dbg('[AUTH] google callback received');
      try {
        const result = await api('/auth/google', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ id_token: resp.credential }),
        });
        dbg('[AUTH] google auth success:', result.id);
        currentUser = result;
        route();
      } catch (e) {
        dbg('[AUTH] google auth failed:', e.message);
        showToast(e.message);
      }
    },
  });
  _googleInitialized = true;
  return true;
}

function _ensureGoogleInit() {
  if (!window.google?.accounts?.id) {
    dbg('[AUTH] google SDK not loaded yet, retrying');
    setTimeout(_ensureGoogleInit, 200);
    return;
  }
  _initGoogle();
}

function authGoogle() {
  dbg('[AUTH] authGoogle');
  _ensureGoogleInit();
  if (window.google?.accounts?.oauth2) {
    dbg('[AUTH] using oauth2 code flow');
    const client = google.accounts.oauth2.initCodeClient({
      client_id: _googleClientId,
      scope: 'openid email profile',
      ux_mode: 'popup',
      callback: async (resp) => {
        if (resp.error) {
          dbg('[AUTH] google popup error:', resp.error);
          return;
        }
        dbg('[AUTH] google popup code received');
        try {
          const result = await api('/auth/google/code', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ code: resp.code }),
          });
          dbg('[AUTH] google auth success:', result.id);
          currentUser = result;
          route();
        } catch (e) {
          dbg('[AUTH] google auth failed:', e.message);
          showToast(e.message);
        }
      },
    });
    client.requestCode();
  } else if (window.google?.accounts?.id) {
    dbg('[AUTH] oauth2 unavailable, falling back to id.prompt');
    google.accounts.id.prompt();
  } else {
    showToast('Google Sign-In is not available');
  }
}

                    )

                        room_id,
                        {
                            "event": "link_preview",
                            "message_id": msg["id"],
                            "room_id": room_id,
                            "link_preview": preview,
                        },
                    )

        meta = mgr._room_meta.get(room_id, {"type": "general", "name": ""})

        text_preview = ""
        if msg_type == "text":
            text_preview = (text or "")[:100]
        elif msg_type == "image":
            text_preview = "Sent a photo"
        elif msg_type == "video":
            text_preview = "Sent a video"
        elif msg_type == "location":
            text_preview = "Shared a location"
        elif msg_type == "meetup_card":

        # another room must still get its badge), so the foreground viewer's
        # client ignores updates for its open room and mark_read broadcasts
        # the cross-device clear.

            if room_id not in badge_rooms or uid == user_id:

            unread[room_id] = unread.get(room_id, 0) + 1

                    "room_id": room_id,
                    "count": unread[room_id],
                    "type": meta.get("type", "general"),
                    "name": meta.get("name", ""),
                    "sender_name": display_name,
                    "preview": text_preview,
                },
            )

        all_targets = _get_room_notification_targets(db, room_id, user_id)
        now = time.monotonic()
        push_targets = [
            uid
            for uid in all_targets
            if uid not in connected_uids or now - mgr._last_ws_activity.get(uid, 0) > 30
        ]

            len(all_targets),

        room_name = meta.get("name", "")
        for uid in push_targets:

            db.commit()

                        "_mod0.webp",
                        "_mod1.webp",
                        "_mod2.webp",

            except Exception:

content.text: Good, that covers the gap. Now let me double-check the `openRoom` REST-fallback path that skips decryption — this looked like a real functional bug. Let me verify by re-reading that section carefully.

## Chat Frontend Sweep — `server/chat/chat.html`, `server/static/shared.js`, `server/static/sw.js`

Read all 4,794 lines of `chat.html` in order, plus the full `shared.js` (97 lines) and `sw.js` (113 lines). Cross-checked server-side validation in `chat_ws.py` wherever a sink's safety depended on it (reactions, media URLs, location coordinates).

### CRITICAL
No issues found.

### HIGH
No issues found. Every `innerHTML`/`insertAdjacentHTML` sink that touches user-controlled data (room/meetup/DM names, message text, reply snippets, link previews, member names, country names) runs through `esc()`/`escapeHtml()` or the attribute-safe `jss()` helper (`chat.html:4260`, correctly double-escapes: JS-string-escape then HTML-escape, in the right order for a single-quoted JS literal inside a double-quoted HTML attribute). The one case that looks unescaped at first glance — the `location` message type's `href="https://maps.google.com/?q=${c.lat},${c.lng}"` at `chat.html:2198-2201` — is actually safe: `c.lat`/`c.lng` are read via `JSON.parse`, so a string payload crafted for injection makes `c.lat.toFixed(5)` throw, which falls into the existing `catch` that re-renders the raw content through `escapeHtml`. Reaction emoji (`chat.html:2260-2266`) are constrained server-side to `ALLOWED_REACTIONS` (`chat_ws.py:1134,1751`), and media URLs rendered into `src`/`onclick` (`chat.html:2189,2192`) are constrained to `_UPLOAD_URL_RE` both server-side (`chat_ws.py:1394-1408`) and client-side for decrypted E2EE media (`_validateDecryptedMedia`, `chat.html:1151-1160`).

### MEDIUM

- **[MEDIUM] chat.html:1978-1989** — `openRoom`'s REST fallback path (taken whenever the WebSocket isn't `readyState 1` yet when a room is opened, e.g. a slow/failed handshake) fetches messages via `api('/rooms/'+roomId+'/messages')` and calls `renderMessages()` directly, **without** ever calling `_decryptMessageContent()`. For an E2EE DM this means the raw `{e2ee:true,...}` envelope is passed to `renderMessage()`, which does `JSON.parse(m.content).text` and gets `undefined` — the message renders as a blank bubble. It self-heals once `connectWS()` completes and `join_room`/`room_history` re-renders with decryption, but on a flaky connection (the exact case this fallback exists for) the blank state can persist for seconds, and it's a confusing failure mode for the encrypted-messaging feature specifically.

- **[MEDIUM] chat.html:2299-2351** — `_markReadRoom`/`_lastSeenTime`/`_markReadTimer` are single global variables, not per-room state, and `openRoom` never flushes a pending mark-read before switching. Sequence: user sees a message in room A → `_debouncedMarkRead()` schedules a 500ms timer for room A. User switches to room B within that window → `_setupReadObserver()` (called from room B's `room_history` handler) overwrites `_markReadRoom = B` and resets `_lastSeenTime = null`. If room B's IntersectionObserver then fires (very likely — messages are visible on load), `_debouncedMarkRead()` runs `clearTimeout(_markReadTimer)`, killing room A's pending send before it ever fires. Room A's read receipt for the message the user actually read is silently dropped — the room can be left with a stale/incorrect unread badge until a genuinely new message arrives there. `_flushMarkRead()` exists and correctly guards this same race for `visibilitychange`, but is never invoked on room switch.

- **[MEDIUM] chat.html:1269 + 2602-2611** — `room_history` fully replaces `messagesByRoom[data.room_id]` (no merge). If a WebSocket reconnect happens right after `sendChatMessage()` pushes an optimistic (`pending: true`) message but before the ack arrives, and the reconnect's `join_room` triggers a fresh `room_history` before the message is visible server-side (e.g. still pending moderation), the optimistic entry is wiped from the array. The 10s "not sent" fallback timeout in `sendChatMessage` then does `msgs.find(m => m.id === tempId && m.pending)`, finds nothing, and silently does nothing — the user's own message disappears from their view with no error toast, indistinguishable from success.

### LOW

- **[LOW] chat.html:454-460** — `avatarHtml()`'s fallback-initials branch interpolates `initials` into the DOM without `esc()`/`escapeHtml()`, unlike every other name-rendering call site in the file. Not currently exploitable: `initials` is built from `name.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0, 2)`, so at most 2 raw characters of attacker-controlled text ever reach the DOM — too little to construct a working tag/attribute injection. Still, it's the one spot that breaks the file's otherwise-consistent escaping discipline, so a future change (longer initials, different truncation) could turn it into real stored XSS.

- **[LOW] chat.html:806/813-830 and 3598/3605-3621** — `openCountryPicker()`/`openEditCountryPicker()` attach a `document`-level `click` listener (`_countryOutsideClick` / `_editCountryOutsideClick`) that is only ever removed by the corresponding `closeCountryPicker()`/`closeEditCountryPicker()`. If the picker's containing modal/prompt is torn down another way (e.g. `submitProfile()` succeeds and replaces `#app` while the country list is still open), the listener is never removed and stays attached to `document` for the rest of the page's life. Currently harmless (the handler's `if (!picker) return` no-ops once the element is gone) but is a genuine unbounded listener leak of the kind the assignment flagged.

**Summary:** No exploitable XSS was found in `chat.html` — every sink handling names, messages, room/meetup titles, reply snippets, and link previews is escaped, and the two sinks that looked unescaped at a glance (`location` coordinates, reaction emoji) are protected by server-side type/allowlist constraints. `sw.js`'s push/notificationclick/pushsubscriptionchange handling matches the documented local-first-ordering and unique-tag invariants with no changes needed. The real findings are three functional state-machine bugs around the E2EE/room-switch/reconnect edges (blank E2EE render on the REST fallback, a room-switch race that drops a pending read receipt, and a reconnect race that can silently vanish an unacked outgoing message) plus two low-impact code-hygiene gaps (one unescaped-but-unexploitable text sink, two small listener leaks). None block deploy; the two MEDIUM state-machine bugs are worth fixing soon since they degrade trust in the encrypted-DM and unread-badge features specifically.

Not currently exploitable: `initials` is built from `name.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0, 2)`, so at most 2 raw characters of attacker-controlled text ever reach the DOM — too little to construct a working tag/attribute injection. Still, it's the one spot that breaks the file's otherwise-consistent escaping discipline, so a future change (longer initials, different truncation) could turn it into real stored XSS.

- **[LOW] chat.html:806/813-830 and 3598/3605-3621** — `openCountryPicker()`/`openEditCountryPicker()` attach a `document`-level `click` listener (`_countryOutsideClick` / `_editCountryOutsideClick`) that is only ever removed by the corresponding `closeCountryPicker()`/`closeEditCountryPicker()`. If the picker's containing modal/prompt is torn down another way (e.g. `submitProfile()` succeeds and replaces `#app` while the country list is still open), the listener is never removed and stays attached to `document` for the rest of the page's life. Currently harmless (the handler's `if (!picker) return` no-ops once the element is gone) but is a genuine unbounded listener leak of the kind the assignment flagged.

**Summary:** No exploitable XSS was found in `chat.html` — every sink handling names, messages, room/meetup titles, reply snippets, and link previews is escaped, and the two sinks that looked unescaped at a glance (`location` coordinates, reaction emoji) are protected by server-side type/allowlist constraints. `sw.js`'s push/notificationclick/pushsubscriptionchange handling matches the documented local-first-ordering and unique-tag invariants with no changes needed. The real findings are three functional state-machine bugs around the E2EE/room-switch/reconnect edges (blank E2EE render on the REST fallback, a room-switch race that drops a pending read receipt, and a reconnect race that can silently vanish an unacked outgoing message) plus two low-impact code-hygiene gaps (one unescaped-but-unexploitable text sink, two small listener leaks). None block deploy; the two MEDIUM state-machine bugs are worth fixing soon since they degrade trust in the encrypted-DM and unread-badge features specifically.
